analysis.reasoning: The tweet highlights China's international engagement on gender equality (Beijing hosting the 4th World Conference on Women and a key global policy document) and domestic policy progress (2016 anti-domestic violence law; 2020 database for potential partners to check abuse history) with the #OrangeTheWorld campaign, signaling both a benevolent international posture and a successful government agenda. This aligns with CH2 (China as a benevolent power) and CH5 (The government of the Chinese Communist Party succeeds).
